notes.note: Metrodorus was evidently a skilled book-arranger or librarian helping put Cicero's library in order; the index (catalogue of titles) waits on his judgement. Distinct from the famous earlier rhetorician Metrodorus of Scepsis.

notes.anchor: You may see the gladiators on the Kalends
notes.note: The Kalends is the first day of the Roman month; Cicero allows the recovering Tiro to stay in Rome for the gladiatorial games on that day and return the next.
